name: MCP230xx I/O Expander
description: The MCP23008 component ([datasheet](https://ww1.microchip.com/downloads/aemDocuments/documents/APID/ProductDocuments/DataSheets/MCP23008-MCP23S08-Data-Sheet-DS20001919.pdf), [Adafruit](https://www.adafruit.com/product/593)) has 8 GPIOs that can be configured independently.

config_entries.label: Address
config_entries.description: The I²C address of the driver. Defaults to `0x20`.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: The id to use for this MCP23008 component.

config_entries.label: Interrupt Pin
config_entries.description: The pin connected to the INT output of the MCP23008. When configured, the component becomes interrupt-driven instead of polling — it only reads the chip when a pin actually changes state, significantly reducing I²C bus traffic and CPU usage. Must be an internal GPIO pin (not another expander pin).

config_entries.label: Open Drain Interrupt
config_entries.description: Configure the interrupt pin to open-drain mode. Useful when the MCP23008's power supply is greater than 3.3 volts. Note that this pin will require a pull-up resistor (to 3.3 volts) when this mode is enabled.
